title: Fix CSV parser to handle quoted commas
prompt: `parse_csv(line)` in solution_stub.py splits a single CSV line into a list of fields, but it naively splits on every comma. Fix it so that a field wrapped in double quotes may contain commas that are NOT treated as separators, e.g. parse_csv('a,"b,c",d') -> ['a', 'b,c', 'd']. The surrounding double quotes must be removed from the returned field. You do not need to support escaped quotes inside a field.
